name: auth-server-k6-load-test
description: k6 load tests for the auth-server

scripts.start:backend: cd ../srv && cross-env ENV=testing npm run start > ..\k6-load-test\backend-k6.log 2>&1
scripts.test:authorize: start-server-and-test start:backend http://localhost:9001 "npm run seed && k6 run --iterations 1 --vus 1 tests/authorize.js"
scripts.test:introspection: start-server-and-test start:backend http://localhost:9001 "npm run seed && k6 run --iterations 1 tests/introspection.js"
scripts.test: start-server-and-test start:backend http://localhost:9001 "npm run seed && k6 run tests/well-known.js && k6 run tests/authorize.js && k6 run  tests/introspection.js"
